html:
Exclusive to:

“Creates a Polar Light.”

-

The Moon Caller's Staff is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Item. It acts similarly to the Star Caller's Staff, with the difference of having 50 uses and creating a Polar Light, that lasts 2 Days and cools the players down, as opposed to warming them like the Dwarf Star. If a Deconstruction Staff is used to break this staff, it will drop 4 Nightmare Fuel, 2 Living Logs and an Iridescent Gem.

The Moon Caller's Staff cannot be crafted. Instead, one must place a Star Caller's Staff on a Moon Stone during a Full Moon, after which it will immediately start turning into a Moon Caller's Staff. Two complete time segments (60 seconds) are needed for the transformation to be completed. Also note that this will also start spawning multiple Werepigs and Hounds which will automatically target the Moon Stone and attempt to destroy it in order to stop the transformation progress. Using a nearly depleted Star Caller's Staff will still create a Moon Caller's Staff at full Durability. Creating a Moon Caller's staff in this way, and subsequently using a Deconstruction Staff on it, is the only way to obtain a third Iridescent Gem to place in the Archive Switch besides using Wilson's alchemy.

A Moon Caller's Staff left in a Moon Stone will constantly generate chilling Polar Light with no added wear on the staff. Haunting a Moon Caller's Staff has a chance to activate it.

Polar Light

The Polar Light appears by using the Moon Caller's Staff. It provides light and Cold in a large radius during 2 days. Haunting a Polar Light will extinguish it.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Moon Staff
Summon the chilling magic of the moon.

(associated with: )
Twisted Moon Caller's Staff
Let the moon send a shiver down your spine.

(associated with: )
Prismatic Moon Caller's Staff
A jeweled, opalescent staff, imbued with the moon's shimmering power.

(associated with: )
Primal Moon Caller's Staff
All hail the mighty moon!

(associated with: )

Tips

  • A single Moon Caller's Staff can keep players cool through about 6 Summers at the cost of sanity. This, along with the fact that it's portable, makes the Moon Caller's Staff a great asset to players during summer.
  • A Moon Caller's Staff placed in the Moon Stone will create a permanent Polar Light. This will not decrease the staff's durability.
  • Care should be taken around the Polar Light, as it can easily cause freezing, even in Summer.

Trivia

  • The gem at the end of the staff appears to be an opal, having a white hue with a colorful tint. This is also indicated by the staff's spawn code.
  • The Moon Caller's Staff was added in the A Little Fixer Upper update.
  • According to Willow, Winona, Wortox, and Wormwood, the Moon Caller's Staff itself radiates cold.
  • Previously, the description of the Moon Caller's Staff in Scrapbook was: "Creates a polar light the cools survivors and gives light for 2 day."

Assets

Exclusive to:
Moon Caller's Staff
Object Info
Perk
Spawns a Polar Light.
Can be placed in a Moon Stone for infinite Polar Light.
-20 per use
Equipable
50 uses
Does not stack
Source
×1 ×4 ×2
Miscellaneous
"opalstaff"
“It's scientifically proven that gems look better on top of sticks.”
–Wilson
“Gotta hold it with my sleeve so my hands don't get cold.”
–Willow
“Tiny stick make big cold!”
–Wolfgang
“As cold and lifeless as... well...”
–Wendy
“MY MOONBASE MADE IT BETTER”
–WX-78
“Appears to summon a cold star into being.”
–Wickerbottom
“Err, moon magic isn't really... my thing... Heh.”
–Woodie
“The charge has made it incredibly powerful.”
–Maxwell
“It weaves the cöld fröm thin air!”
–Wigfrid
“Whew. Gotta be careful where you point it!”
–Webber
“It makes me feel magical.”
–Warly
“Oh! Stick is cold”
–Wormwood
“Did it just get chillier?”
–Winona
“Chilly and bright as a moonlit night.”
–Wortox
“Rainbow light stick!”
–Wurt
“No Woby, this stick isn't for fetching!”
–Walter
“Brrr, I just got chills.”
–Wanda
“Creates a Polar Light.”
-
The Moon Caller's Staff is a Don't Starve Together exclusive Item. It acts similarly to the Star Caller's Staff, with the difference of having 50 uses and creating a Polar Light, that lasts 2 Days and cools the players down, as opposed to warming them like the Dwarf Star. The Moon Caller's Staff cannot be crafted. Instead, one must place a Star Caller's Staff on a Moon Stone during a Full Moon, after which it will immediately start turning into a Moon Caller's Staff. Two complete time segments (60 seconds) are needed for the transformation to be completed. Also note that this will also start spawning multiple Werepigs and Hounds which will automatically target the Moon Stone and attempt to destroy it in order to stop the transformation progress. Using a nearly depleted Star Caller's Staff will still create a Moon Caller's Staff at full Durability. Creating a Moon Caller's staff in this way, and subsequently using a Deconstruction Staff on it, is the only way to obtain a third Iridescent Gem to place in the Archive Switch besides using Wilson's alchemy.
A Moon Caller's Staff left in a Moon Stone will constantly generate chilling Polar Light with no added wear on the staff. Haunting a Moon Caller's Staff has a chance to activate it.
Polar Light[edit | edit source]
Polar Light
Object Info
Perk
Provide light and Cold
+25/min
+35/min ( only)
2 days
Source
Spawns From
Miscellaneous
"staffcoldlight"
“Brr! Chilling.”
–Wilson, when examining a Polar Light.
“Boo! Hissss!”
–Willow, when examining a Polar Light.
“Is cold! Wolfgang will punch!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Polar Light.
“Stars die like everything else...”
–Wendy, when examining a Polar Light.
“EFFECTIVE NATURAL COOLANT”
–WX-78, when examining a Polar Light.
“Some sort of self-contained aurora.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Polar Light.
“At least it won't start a forest fire.”
–Woodie, when examining a Polar Light.
“An impressively condensed point of freezing magic.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Polar Light.
“Frigid as a fröst giant's heart.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Polar Light.
“Woah! The cold makes all our hairs stand up!”
–Webber, when examining a Polar Light.
“I appreciate it on sweltering afternoons.”
–Warly, when examining a Polar Light.
“Oh! Cold stick makes light!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Polar Light.
“That's real pretty.”
–Winona, when examining a Polar Light.
“Hyuyu, how cold and unwelcoming!”
–Wortox, when examining a Polar Light.
“It so cold!”
–Wurt, when examining a Polar Light.
“I just got a chill up my spine.”
–Walter, when examining a Polar Light.
“If it keeps me from dying of heat exposure, I'm happy.”
–Wanda, when examining a Polar Light.
The Polar Light appears by using the Moon Caller's Staff. It provides light and Cold in a large radius during 2 days.
Haunting a Polar Light will extinguish it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Gậy Gọi Mặt Trăng là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó hoạt động tương tự như Gậy Gọi Sao, với điểm khác biệt là có 50 lần sử dụng và tạo ra Ánh sáng Cực, tồn tại trong 2 ngày và làm mát người chơi, trái ngược với việc làm ấm họ như Sao Lùn. Nếu sử dụng Trượng Giải Cấu Trúc để phá vỡ cây trượng này, nó sẽ rơi ra 4 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng, 2 Gỗ Sống và một Đá Quý Ánh Kim.
